history.content: Done — the proposal execution is complete and logged. ### What was changed Edited: - `src/gateway/teams/team-coordinator.ts` - `src/gateway/teams/notify-bridge.ts` - `src/gateway/core/startup.ts` ### What was implemented - Added GOAL_COMPLETE/team completion relay from coordinator into notify-bridge flow. - Added explicit notify-bridge formatter handling for `goal-complete` / `team_task_complete` payloads so completion notifications are clearer and deterministic. - Wired startup-level `onCoordinatorDone` handling to auto-create and run a main-chat analysis task after team run completion. - Added deterministic auto session ID format: `auto_<teamId>_<timestamp>`. - Included a self-contained post-run analysis prompt with run-history snapshot. - Emitted `bg_task_created` metadata event before launching the analysis runner. - Added duplicate-creation guardrails to prevent redundant auto-task creation. ### Validation - Ran `npm run build` (TypeScript compile). - Build succeeded with exit code 0 and no TS errors. ### Outcome GOAL_COMPLETE now reliably relays into a main auto-session post-run analysis workflow, with improved completion messaging and safer task creation behavior.
